activities_projects.title: Push and Pull Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand that force can be a push or a pull
steps: Place a toy car on the floor
Push the toy car and observe its movement
Pull the toy car with a string
Write what happens in both cases
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the basic meaning of force

activities_projects.title: Force Changes Motion
activities_projects.objective: Observe how force changes the motion of objects
steps: Roll a ball on the floor
Stop it using your hand
Kick the ball to change its direction
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that force can start, stop, or change motion

activities_projects.title: Shape Change Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Understand that force can change the shape of objects
steps: Stretch a rubber band
Press a balloon gently
Observe how their shapes change
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises effect of force on shape

activities_projects.title: Contact Force Examples
steps: List five activities involving push or pull
Write how force is applied in each activity
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies contact forces in daily life

activities_projects.title: Friction Observation
steps: Push a book across a smooth table
Push it again on a rough surface
Compare how easily it moves

activities_projects.title: Magnet Force Test
steps: Bring a magnet near paper clips
Observe how they move towards the magnet
Record the observation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands magnetic force as a non-contact force

activities_projects.title: Gravity Demonstration
steps: Drop a ball from a small height
Observe how it falls to the ground
Explain why it falls

activities_projects.title: Floating and Sinking Test
steps: Place a stone in water
Place a plastic cap in water
Observe which object floats and which sinks

activities_projects.title: Force in Daily Life Chart
activities_projects.objective: Identify forces used in daily life
steps: Write examples of forces used daily
Draw simple pictures to represent them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects force concepts to daily life

activities_projects.title: Force Direction Experiment
steps: Push the toy car forward
Push it sideways
Observe how direction of motion changes
